key_insights.insight: Chasing fitness without health is dangerous, health should be what fitness can come out of.
key_insights.quote: Health is about what fitness can come out of and unless you lookafter health it's dangerous.

key_insights.insight: Identity creates the problem, then purports to solve the problem, resulting in a cycle of suffering.
key_insights.quote: The identity was creating the problem and the identity was about solving the problem I had to keep the problem to keep the identity and I had to keep try solving itto keep the identity as well and it was never going to go anywhere

key_insights.insight: True creativity comes from effortlessness, relaxation, and passion, allowing for exploration without insisting on a specific outcome.
key_insights.quote: When you're becoming creative you don't try to be creative that's the whole point of not being creative is you allowand you explore and what comes out is surely more of what's really who we are.

key_insights.insight: To be fully present, one must follow their highest passion and excitement in each moment.
key_insights.quote: Therefore it comes down tofollowing your highest passion and excitementin every moment.

key_insights.insight: Acceptance of the present, including past experiences, is essential for discovering one's passion and moving forward.
key_insights.quote: And you can't get to that passion without the acceptance.And the acceptance is, this is what I've got.This is where I'm meant to be. This is how are and once they come to ease with that then suddenly there is that well I can start to feel what it is I want to do next.

key_insights.insight: True caring for someone involves letting go of personal ideas about them, which requires letting go of personal ideas about oneself.
key_insights.quote: It's to completely let go of your own ideas of them.And in order to do that, you have to let go of yours about you.

key_insights.insight: To gain freedom in the future, you've got to free up the past.
key_insights.quote: If I want freedom in the future,I've got to free up the past.

actionable_advice.advice: In any moment, follow your highest excitement within the boundaries of your obligations.
actionable_advice.how_to: If you have to drive somewhere, listen to a podcast you enjoy or call someone you've been meaning to connect with.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice 'being' and disconnect from the external.
actionable_advice.how_to: Dedicate 10 minutes each evening to just sit, close your eyes and disconnect from the external. Don't force ideas, just observe.

actionable_advice.advice: Tune into what's my highest passion excitement.
actionable_advice.how_to: If you are stuck in a tiny lift, think, paint, picture, dream and feel what you love to be doing now.

memorable_stories: The story of Johnny's neck injury and his brother finding him on the exercise bike wearing a neck brace.
The story of the question Patrice Evra's girlfriend asked, 'Are you happy?' and the impact it had on his journey of discovering himself.
The story of young football player chat and his insight about caring for someone involves letting go of personal ideas of them
contrarian_claims: Being seen as illogical can be a strong place to be in a society that leans towards stress, winning, conquering, achieving and reactivity.
Stress has become a badge in workplaces.
Winning the world cup isn't the most important thing; it's about being true to yourself and your purpose.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Jonny Wilkinson: Winning The World Cup Led To My Darkest Days
